tasks.label: CyberSim: Run All (baseline)
tasks.command: python run_simulation.py --task brute_force --agent baseline --seed 42 > artifacts/score_easy.json; python run_simulation.py --task malware_spread --agent baseline --seed 42 > artifacts/score_medium.json; python run_simulation.py --task data_exfiltration --agent baseline --seed 42 > artifacts/score_hard.json; python -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('artifacts'); e=json.loads((p/'score_easy.json').read_text()); m=json.loads((p/'score_medium.json').read_text()); h=json.loads((p/'score_hard.json').read_text()); print(f'easy: {e[\"score\"]:.4f}'); print(f'medium: {m[\"score\"]:.4f}'); print(f'hard: {h[\"score\"]:.4f}')"

tasks.label: CyberSim: Run Judge Scoreboard
tasks.command: python scripts/run_openai_baseline.py --tasks brute_force malware_spread data_exfiltration --compare-agent baseline
